---
name: 🖋️ Conventions / Docs
about: Add or update documentation or conventions in the project
title: "[Docs] ..."
labels: ['📚 documentation', '📐 conventions']
assignees: ''
---

## 📘 Summary

> _What are you documenting or proposing? E.g. "Script naming conventions", "Input mapping doc", etc._

## 🧱 File(s) to Edit

> _Where should this live? e.g., `docs/conventions.md`, `README.md`_

## 🔍 Purpose

> _Why does this doc or convention help? What does it solve or prevent?_

## 🧪 Example

> _Give a short example of how to apply the convention or use the doc._
